query:
INSERT INTO raw.temporal_ledger (
                        id,
                        source_material_id,
                        offset_start,
                        offset_end,
                        offset_kind,
                        ts_capture,
                        precision,
                        clock,
                        source_type
                    )
                    VALUES ($1::ulid, $2::ulid, 0, $3, 'byte', $4, 'millisecond', 'wall', 'realtime_capture')
